title: PackUK: 2025 recyclability assessment requirements
body: "This document outlines the temporary regulatory position regarding 2025 H1 recyclability assessments for packaging producers. It clarifies how PackUK will interpret compliance where H1 data is not submitted, and how H2 data may be used instead.  The statement also explains how this will influence modulated fees for the 2026-2027 period. It includes worked examples and enforcement implications for non-compliance.  "
